general_tips.title: General Tips for IELTS Writing Task 1

content.text: The first thing you need to know is the difference between the Academic and General Training papers. The Academic paper is for students who want to study at a university in an English-speaking country. The General Training paper is for people who want to work or migrate to an English-speaking country. The Task 1 for each paper is different.

items: Academic: You will be given a graph, chart, or diagram and asked to describe it in your own words.
General Training: You will be given a situation and asked to write a letter.

academic.title: Bar Chart
academic.content: This lesson will help you to describe bar charts and includes vocabulary and model answers.

academic.title: Line Graph
academic.content: Learn how to describe line graphs, the vocabulary needed and see a model answer.

academic.title: Table
academic.content: This page gives you a list of all lessons and tips for writing task 1 tables.

academic.title: Pie Chart
academic.content: Learn useful vocabulary for describing pie charts and see a model answer.

academic.title: Process Diagram
academic.content: Learn how to describe a process diagram and the vocabulary needed for it.

academic.title: Maps
academic.content: This lesson will show you how to describe maps for IELTS writing task 1.

general_training.title: Letter Writing
general_training.content: Learn how to write a formal and informal letter for your GT test.

general_tips.title: General Tips for IELTS Writing Task 2
general_tips.content: This page has a list of all my task 2 lessons and tips. It is a long page, so please scroll down to find what you need.

essay_types.title: Agree / Disagree
essay_types.content: This lesson will show you how to write an agree/disagree essay.

essay_types.title: Advantages / Disadvantages
essay_types.content: Learn how to write an advantages and disadvantages essay.

essay_types.title: Cause / Solution
essay_types.content: This page shows you how to structure a cause and solution essay.

essay_types.title: Opinion
essay_types.content: Learn how to give your opinion in an IELTS writing task 2 essay.

essay_types.title: Discussion
essay_types.content: This lesson will show you how to write a discussion essay.
